data.body: 625b review2 PASS (signed@7ce8643); CLAIMED. Advisories captured for impl brief: (1) resolve_assignee signature is (local_value:str, remote_identity:dict|None)->(value,authoritative,is_account_id) — NOT jira_key; canonical identity replaces raw lookup. (2) inbound_fields.py is at ROOT (not adapters/jira/). (3) _diff_labels/_diff_links/_diff_status_annotation_labels/_diff_comments must KEEP reading RAW jira_fields — only the _diff_fields field-path is replaced by canonical comparison. (4) map_fields_to_remote + resolve_assignee added to OutboundMapper Protocol in _backend.py. Authoring oracle + strong-tier held-out impl next.
